TestCase z24Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_x = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_x, t1.x, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.x = follow_case_x;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 1
    if (follow_case.n < 1) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: clamp low values to -50.0
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        if (follow_case.x[i] < -50.0) {
            follow_case.x[i] = -50.0;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
